name: Curried Meatballs with Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Finely chopped green onions (with tops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Chutney Sauce.
2. Heat oven to 400 degrees.
3. Mix remaining ingredients; shape into forty-eight 1-inch meatballs.
4. Place meatballs in a rectangular pan, 13 X 9 X 2 inches, sprayed with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Bake uncovered until light brown and no longer pink inside, 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Serve hot with Chutney Sauce and wooden picks.
Chutney Sauce:
Mix all ingredients; cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
Microwave Directions:
Prepare the Chutney Sauce and meatballs as directed.
Place 24 meatballs in a microwavable pie plate, 9 X 1-1/4 inches. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on high (100%) for 3 minutes; rearrange meatballs.
Cover and microwave until no longer pink inside, 2 to 4 minutes longer.
Let stand covered for 3 minutes; drain.
Repeat with remaining meatballs.
Serve hot with Chutney Sauce and wooden picks.
